text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 88 

GAP_DAYS_OONP_OS 

LABEL: Gap Out-of-Network Pharmacy — days in other day supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in another days’ supply of the drugs (other than 1 or 3 
months) on this tier, when using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the coverage gap phase 
of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files)
